description: Install the 'drc' package and perform a comprehensive dose-response analysis on the 'ryegrass' and 'S.alba' datasets. For the 'ryegrass' dataset, fit four models (LL.4, W1.4, W2.4, BC.4) and compare them using AIC and lack-of-fit tests, exporting the results to /home/ga/RProjects/output/ryegrass_model_comparison.csv with columns: model, AIC, logLik, ED50, ED50_lower95, ED50_upper95, and lack_of_fit_p. For the 'S.alba' dataset, fit a joint model for Glyphosate and Bentazone to calculate the ED50 for each and the Selectivity Index (SI = ED50_Glyphosate / ED50_Bentazone), saving the results to /home/ga/RProjects/output/alba_selectivity.csv with columns: herbicide, ED50, ED50_lower95, ED50_upper95, and slope. Generate a multi-panel figure at /home/ga/RProjects/output/dose_response_plots.png showing the Ryegrass curve (Panel A) and the S.alba selectivity curves overlaid (Panel B). Save the complete R script to /home/ga/RProjects/dose_response_analysis.R.
